languages.text: "Мы вернули твою честь, эттфатер, и это главное. Благословение Всеотца отпечатано на твоем роду свыше и не стоит печалиться из-за... бумаги". {n}Несмотря на браваду, Ульфар все же старается не сильно топтаться по Торговому патенту.{/n}

"We have restored your honour, Aett-Vater, and that is what matters most. The Allfather's blessing is stamped on your dynasty from on high, and you need not mourn this... paper." {n}Despite his bravado, Ulfar is still careful not to tread heavily on the Warrant of Trade.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Мы вернули твою честь, эттфатер, и это главное. Благословение Всеотца отпечатано на твоем роду свыше и не стоит печалиться из-за... бумаги". {n}Несмотря на браваду, Ульфар все же старается не сильно топтаться по Торговому патенту.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "We have restored your honour, Aett-Vater, and that is what matters most. The Allfather's blessing is stamped on your dynasty from on high, and you need not mourn this... paper." {n}Despite his bravado, Ulfar is still careful not to tread heavily on the Warrant of Trade.{/n}

"We have restored your honour, Aett-Vater, and that is what matters most. The Allfather's blessing is stamped on your dynasty from on high, and you need not mourn this... paper." {n}Despite his bravado, Ulfar is still careful not to tread heavily on the Warrant of Trade.{/n}

"We have restored your honour, Aett-Vater, and that is what matters most. The Allfather's blessing is stamped on your dynasty from on high, and you need not mourn this... paper." {n}Despite his bravado, Ulfar is still careful not to tread heavily on the Warrant of Trade.{/n}

languages.text: 「貴方の名誉は取り戻されました。エト・ヴァター。それが最も大切なことです。オールファザーの祝福は貴方の家系に降り注いでいます。この…紙を嘆く必要はありません。」{n}ウルファルは強がるが、貿易証書を踏みにじるのを恐れている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have restored your honour, Aett-Vater, and that is what matters most. The Allfather's blessing is stamped on your dynasty from on high, and you need not mourn this... paper." {n}Despite his bravado, Ulfar is still careful not to tread heavily on the Warrant of Trade.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「貴方の名誉は取り戻されました。エト・ヴァター。それが最も大切なことです。オールファザーの祝福は貴方の家系に降り注いでいます。この…紙を嘆く必要はありません。」{n}ウルファルは強がるが、貿易証書を踏みにじるのを恐れている。{/n}

languages.text: «Hemos restaurado su honor, Aett-Vater, y eso es lo que importa. La bendición del Padre de todas las cosas recae sobre su dinastía desde lo más alto. No necesita llorar este... papel». {n}Pese a sus bravatas, Ulfar sigue evitando pisar con fuerza la Patente de Comercio.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have restored your honour, Aett-Vater, and that is what matters most. The Allfather's blessing is stamped on your dynasty from on high, and you need not mourn this... paper." {n}Despite his bravado, Ulfar is still careful not to tread heavily on the Warrant of Trade.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Hemos restaurado su honor, Aett-Vater, y eso es lo que importa. La bendición del Padre de todas las cosas recae sobre su dinastía desde lo más alto. No necesita llorar este... papel». {n}Pese a sus bravatas, Ulfar sigue evitando pisar con fuerza la Patente de Comercio.{/n}

languages.text: "Wir haben deine Ehre wiederhergestellt, Aett-Vater, und allein das zählt. Der Segen des Allvaters wurde Eurer Dynastie von höchster Stelle gewährt, also trauert nicht um dieses ... Stück Papier." {n}Trotz seines Wagemuts achtet Ulfar darauf, nicht allzu fest auf den Handelsbrief zu treten.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have restored your honour, Aett-Vater, and that is what matters most. The Allfather's blessing is stamped on your dynasty from on high, and you need not mourn this... paper." {n}Despite his bravado, Ulfar is still careful not to tread heavily on the Warrant of Trade.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben deine Ehre wiederhergestellt, Aett-Vater, und allein das zählt. Der Segen des Allvaters wurde Eurer Dynastie von höchster Stelle gewährt, also trauert nicht um dieses ... Stück Papier. {n}Trotz seines Wagemuts achtet Ulfar darauf, nicht allzu fest auf den Handelsbrief zu treten.{/n}

languages.text: « Nous avons rétabli votre honneur, aett-vater, et c'est là le plus important. La bénédiction du Père de Tous protège toute votre dynastie, et vous n'avez donc pas à vous soucier de ce... papier. » {n}Si le ton d'Ulfar est très assuré, il prend tout de même soin de ne pas s'appesantir sur la lettre de marque.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have restored your honour, Aett-Vater, and that is what matters most. The Allfather's blessing is stamped on your dynasty from on high, and you need not mourn this... paper." {n}Despite his bravado, Ulfar is still careful not to tread heavily on the Warrant of Trade.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Nous avons rétabli votre honneur, aett-vater, et c'est là le plus important. La bénédiction du Père de Tous protège toute votre dynastie, et vous n'avez donc pas à vous soucier de ce... papier. » {n}Si le ton d'Ulfar est très assuré, il prend tout de même soin de ne pas s'appesantir sur la lettre de marque.{/n}

languages.text: “狼领，我们已经恢复了您的荣誉，这才是最重要的。全父的祝福已从天穹烙印在您的王朝之上，您无需为……一张纸而哀伤。”{n}尽管语气豪迈，乌尔法仍小心翼翼，避免重踏贸易授状。{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have restored your honour, Aett-Vater, and that is what matters most. The Allfather's blessing is stamped on your dynasty from on high, and you need not mourn this... paper." {n}Despite his bravado, Ulfar is still careful not to tread heavily on the Warrant of Trade.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “狼领，我们已经恢复了您的荣誉，这才是最重要的。全父的祝福已从天穹烙印在您的王朝之上，您无需为……一张纸而哀伤。”{n}尽管语气豪迈，乌尔法仍小心翼翼，避免重踏贸易授状。{/n}

languages.text: "Onurunu geri kazandık Aett-Vater, önemli olan da bu. Yücebaba'nın kutsaması, hanedanına yukarıdan damgalanmıştır. Bu... Kâğıt için yas tutmana gerek yok." {n}Ulfar, kabalığına rağmen yine de Ticari Ruhsatname'ye sertçe basmamaya dikkat ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have restored your honour, Aett-Vater, and that is what matters most. The Allfather's blessing is stamped on your dynasty from on high, and you need not mourn this... paper." {n}Despite his bravado, Ulfar is still careful not to tread heavily on the Warrant of Trade.{/n}
